home.title: My Timezones
home.subtitle: Manage and compare your team's timezones with style

dialog.addDescription: Track time and working hours for a new location
dialog.searchPlaceholder: Search for a city or country

guide.title: How to use TimeSync
guide.intro: This guide explains how to add and manage timezone cards, and how the free vs premium limits work.
guide.addDescription: Click 'Add Timezone' and search for a city. Set working hours and a label, then save to add it to your list.
guide.editDescription: Use the edit button on a timezone card to change details, or delete it to remove it from your list.
guide.premiumDescription: On the free plan you can save up to 3 timezones. To save more, upgrade to Premium using the upgrade panel.
guide.tip1: Use meaningful labels for team members or offices.
guide.tip2: Keep working hours accurate so meeting suggestions are useful.
guide.tip3: Sign in to sync your timezones across devices (requires a backend session).
